course_description: This course is designed to introduce first-year Sloan MBA students to the fundamental techniques of using data. In particular, the course focuses on various ways of modeling, or thinking structurally about decision problems in order to make informed management decisions.
course_description_html: This course is designed to introduce first-year Sloan MBA students to the fundamental techniques of using data. In particular, the course focuses on various ways of modeling, or thinking structurally about decision problems in order to make informed management decisions.

image_metadata.caption: Visualization of retweet network data on Twitter. The retweets network is shown in green, followers network in gray, red nodes are original tweets and yellow nodes are retweets. (Image courtesy of Elsevier, Inc., {{% resource_link "be59bd18-53e8-49a2-a838-34fbe0fb2efd" "http://www.sciencedirect.com" %}}. Used with permission. Source: Morales, A.J., R.M. Benito et al. "{{% resource_link "10d11332-ded2-4fff-9413-8019d999921b" "Efficiency of Human Activity on Information Spreading on Twitter" %}}." _Social Networks_ 39 (2014): 1-11.)
image_metadata.credit: Courtesy of Elsevier, Inc., http://www.sciencedirect.com. Used with permission. Source: Morales, A.J., R.M. Benito et al. "Efficiency of Human Activity on Information Spreading on Twitter." Social Networks 39 (2014): 1-11. http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.socnet.2014.03.007
image_metadata.image-alt: Subgraph of the retweet network superimposed to the corresponding followers network.
